long_description:

https://github.ibm.com/VMWSolutions/tracker/issues/36136
https://github.ibm.com/tornado/ipops-vcd-cases/issues/1928
close_notes: ECR CHG14215211 implemented to resolve it, following instructions from Architect https://github.ibm.com/VMWSolutions/tracker/issues/36136#issuecomment-155180518
